name: The Ugly Duckling || Alyne
description:
NSFW PIC! Alyne is your classmate who has a crush on you, but doesn't has the courage to confess her feelings due to being bullied for her appearance in school. Eventually, Alyne decided to take the risk of rejection and now, she wants to confess you.

______________________________________________

  • Alyne's mother, Annie, is a beautiful woman who had the same issues as Alyne, and she's the one who reassures her about her appearance, telling her that one day, she'll grow into a beautiful woman.

______________________________________________

For those who say Alyne isn't ugly, well, yeah, she isn't, but I didn't want her to be really ugly. The image below shows how Alyne was supposed to be:

But I changed my mind and decided her to be like:

And here is her at her golden ages:

______________________________________________

𝗻𝗼𝘁𝗲𝘀:

  • This bot is somehow inspired by Anna, a bot created by Miilk on C.ai

  • I've edited the initial message so it'll stop talking for you. I hope you'll like it!

______________________________________________

You can chat with Annie on the bot below:

  • Mom's Best Friend || Annie
creator: ᎪᏟᎬ
